targets.expr: (namedprocess_namegroup_memory_bytes{instance=~"$host", memtype="resident", job="$job"} / ignoring(memtype) namedprocess_namegroup_num_procs > 0) / (namedprocess_namegroup_memory_bytes{instance=~"$host", memtype="virtual", job="$job"} / ignoring(memtype) namedprocess_namegroup_num_procs > 0)

panels.description: Total amount of memory that may be required by the process.
panels.title: Virtual Memory

panels.description:
Voluntary context switches.  
Occurs when a thread performs I/O writes or requests an unavailable resource.
panels.title: Voluntary Context Switches

panels.description:
Involuntary context switches.  
Occurs when a thread exceeds the time slice assigned by the scheduler.
panels.title: Nonvoluntary Context Switches

panels.description: Number of open file descriptors for the group.
panels.title: Group File Descriptors

panels.description:
USED - Number of open file descriptors.  
MAX - Maximum number of open file descriptors.
panels.title: Total File Descriptors

panels.description: Number of bytes read by the group.
panels.title: Read Bytes

panels.description: Number of bytes written by the group.
panels.title: Write Bytes

panels.description: Number of processes in the group.
panels.title: Number Processes
